items.e: Seat: pedals fully reachable, wrists on the wheel.
Head restraint level with the top of your head.
Mirrors + belt, doors closed, then start.

note.e: Do the Schulterblick before every pull-away, lane change and turn. Examiners watch for the head movement.
note.d: Schulterblick vor jedem Anfahren, Spurwechsel, Abbiegen. Der Prüfer achtet auf die Kopfbewegung.

items.e: 1 Mirrors · 2 Signal · 3 Position.
4 Slow & gear down · 5 Yield · 6 Second look (right turn: bikes!).
items.d: 4 Tempo raus · 5 Vorfahrt beachten · 6 Zweiter Blick (rechts: Räder!).

items.e: 7 Pedestrians on the target road · 8 tight right / wide left arc.
items.d: 7 Fußgänger der Zielstraße · 8 eng rechts / weit links.

items.e: Signal, pull level with the front car, ~50 cm gap.
items.d: Blinken, neben das vordere Auto, ~50 cm Abstand.

items.e: Reverse to bumper level → full lock to kerb.
At ~45°, rear car's headlight in your mirror → counter-steer.
Straighten, centre. Constant all-round looks.
Reverse bay parking: walking pace, 360° observation, correcting is fine.
items.d: Rückwärts quer einparken: Schritttempo, Rundumblick, Korrigieren ok.

items.e: 3-point turn: kerb to kerb, full locks, look through the rear window.
items.d: Wenden in 3 Zügen: Bordstein zu Bordstein, Volleinschlag, Blick durchs Heckfenster.

items.e: Emergency stop: brake hard to standstill, clutch just before.
items.d: Gefahrbremsung: voll bremsen, Kupplung kurz vor Stillstand.

items.e: Hill start: handbrake, biting point, gas, release.
Lights: name & operate all of them, brake light check.
Tyres: tread 1.6 mm, pressure, damage, where values are listed.
items.d: Reifen: Profil 1,6 mm, Druck, Schäden, wo Werte stehen.

items.e: Fluids: oil, coolant, washer, brake fluid under the bonnet.
Other: horn, wipers, warning lamps, triangle/vest/first-aid location.
Approach junctions ready to stop; cover the brake.
Keep right; left lane = overtaking only.
Autobahn: match speed, mirror + blind spot, merge smoothly.
items.d: Autobahn: Tempo angleichen, Spiegel + Schulterblick, sauber einfädeln.

items.e: Skipped blind-spot checks.
Rolling over a STOP line.
Right-of-way mistakes.
Too fast in 30-zones; not signalling; tailgating.
items.d: Zu schnell in 30er-Zonen; nicht geblinkt; zu dichtes Auffahren.

items.e: ~55 min total, ~25 min driving (class B); examiner + instructor on board.
items.d: ~55 Min, ~25 Min Fahrt (Klasse B); Prüfer + Fahrlehrer dabei.

items.e: Abfahrkontrolle, 2–3 maneuvers, town + country + usually autobahn.
items.d: Abfahrkontrolle, 2–3 Manöver, Stadt + Land + meist Autobahn.

items.e: Instant fail: endangering, red light, ignored right of way, intervention.
items.d: Sofort durch: Gefährdung, Rotlicht, Vorfahrt missachtet, Eingriff.

items.e: Announcing your actions ("letting the cyclist pass") shows awareness.
items.d: Ansagen („ich lasse den Radfahrer durch") zeigt Übersicht.

items.e: Drive deliberately; show your checks visibly.
One small mistake rarely fails you — keep driving safely.
items.d: Ein kleiner Fehler heißt selten durchgefallen — sicher weiterfahren.

items.e: If unsure, take the safe option.
